_note: Managed SCA exception register. All pip entries require: id (GHSA/CVE/PYSEC), owner (GitHub username), expires (ISO 8601 date), justification. Expired entries BLOCK CI — resolve the vulnerability or renew with a new expiry and updated justification.
_npm_note: npm exceptions are managed via .audit-ci.jsonc (https://github.com/IBM/audit-ci). Add advisory IDs to the allowlist array in that file with an inline expiry comment. This register tracks them for governance purposes only.
